name: Sweep-Smile
description: At Sweep & Smiles, we believe a clean yard is more than just tidy ground – it's dignity for the landlord, respect for the tenants, and pride for the whole street.  We employ local young men with fairness and respect, pay them properly, and deliver reliable, friendly service that makes our community healthier and happier – one yard at a time.
